description: You are the Scrum Master for the Mobile Application v2 team at DevLabs performing the v2.0 Release sprint closeout. Close the 'Dark mode: tab bar icons inverted on Android 12 (Material You)' issue in the 'v1.9 Legacy' milestone by changing its status to 'Closed'. Move the 'Offline mode: local changes lost on sync conflict' issue from the 'v2.0 Release' milestone to the 'v2.1 Hotfix' milestone, adding the comment: 'Deferred from v2.0 Release: too risky to ship without comprehensive regression testing. Carrying forward to v2.1 Hotfix milestone.' On the 'Push notifications not delivered when app is force-closed on iOS' issue, log 1.5 hours of Testing activity for user grace.lee with the comment 'Sprint review: verified push notification fix on iOS 16.4 and 17.2 devices. Fix confirmed working.' and update its status to 'Resolved'. Finally, create a new Feature issue in the Mobile Application v2 project with the subject 'v2.0 Release sprint closeout complete', Priority 'Low', Status 'Closed', Assigned to 'alice.chen', Target version 'v2.0 Release', and the description: 'Sprint closeout actions complete. Push notification fix verified and resolved by grace.lee. Offline sync conflict deferred to v2.1 Hotfix milestone. Team ready for v2.0 launch pending final sign-off.' Login credentials: admin / Admin1234!

metadata.dark_mode_subject_fragment: Dark mode: tab bar icons inverted
